let's make it optional to have these per-session rooms if its not enabled (and I want it disabled) it should open the channel selector tui (equivalent to using --channel with no arg) when using tenex-edge launch when running without tenex-edge launch and we don't have a channel, just use the project channel design the change and also, in the background, run codex exec to get a second pair of eyes to design this. Implement and test that it works as expected.

Implemented per-session rooms as optional (off by default) with config flag `perSessionRooms` in `~/.tenex-edge/config.json`, and verified with `codex exec`. When disabled, `tenex-edge launch` without `--channel` opens the interactive channel picker, and plain `claude` with no channel uses the project channel. All three requested behaviors are implemented and tested.
